programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Awards Show Problem/ The Wrong-Headed Problem

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Nighttime in the Neighborhood

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Cha-Cha-Licious/ Show and Smell

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Class

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fault

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Townhouse Incident

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Alta Kockers

programme.title: The Sinner: Part I

programme.title: Briarpatch: First Time in Saint Disgrace

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Monster

programme.title: Briarpatch: First Time in Saint Disgrace

programme.title: The Closer: Home Improvement

programme.title: The Closer: Family Affair

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Blues for Sister Someone
programme.desc: Izzie grills George about his personal life while Addison takes Alex to task over a sensitive case. Elsewhere, Burke feels the pressure when he treats his musical hero.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Damage Case

programme.title: Wife Swap: Donahue/ Baker
programme.desc: A glamorous southern belle swaps places with a mother of six who helps run a dairy farm.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Ghani/ Stallone
programme.desc: A free-spirited mother swaps place with a straight-laced stay-at-home mom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: After a devastating earthquake, Marty works to save the Hartley's log cabin and Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse. Matt constructs a new building from scratch to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: From the Outside In
programme.desc: The Raneys help young dog mushers to defend themselves to survive the Alaskan wilderness. They do not trust outsiders, but the mushers need all the help they can get as bears are raiding their dogs' food supplies, and the threat of wildfires looms.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Golden Cabin
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin strike a risky deal with claim owners Jerry and Martha. The pair offer to renovate the couple's rundown 30-year-old cabin, but if the land isn't profitable, they will have to negotiate a deal that will make their investment worth it.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: From the Outside In
programme.desc: The Raneys help young dog mushers to defend themselves to survive the Alaskan wilderness. They do not trust outsiders, but the mushers need all the help they can get as bears are raiding their dogs' food supplies, and the threat of wildfires looms.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Golden Cabin
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin strike a risky deal with claim owners Jerry and Martha. The pair offer to renovate the couple's rundown 30-year-old cabin, but if the land isn't profitable, they will have to negotiate a deal that will make their investment worth it.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: The Colony: Arrival and Survival
programme.desc: Ten volunteers enter an experimental post-catastrophe world to see if they can survive and rebuild after a global disaster. Cordoned off in a downtown Los Angeles warehouse they must secure shelter, filter water and defend their new home from thieves.

programme.title: The Colony: Power Struggle
programme.desc: A stable power supply is top priority after they create a wood-fuelled generator.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hitler's Lost Bunker
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's underground bunker was the home of some of the greatest secrets of the Nazi's. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to discover new evidence of Hitler's evil vision for global domination.

programme.title: Unearthed: Finding Sparta's 300
programme.desc: New discoveries might lead investigators to the legendary group of 300 Spartan warriors who died fighting off one million invading Persians, and using cutting-edge tech, experts reconstruct the lost battlefield to uncover the secrets of their last stand.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rise of The Machines
programme.desc: Rick tries to outsmart a vital piece of equipment that has a mind of its own. Parker splurges on a brand new toy to get more gold. The Beets bring in a hired gun to turn around the season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Million-Dollar Pay Day
programme.desc: Parker gambles big and splits his crew in search of a massive score. Rick calls in a mining legend to save his season. The Beets move heaven and earth to get all three kids bringing in gold.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Met My Fiance in Jail
programme.desc: With only nine weeks to go until America's wedding, Randy goes undercover to surprise a police officer and his bride-to-be.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Looks Bad, Feels Worse
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent is challenged with a case when a women with giant springs on her shoes enters her office. A man with a rare disease has the largest feet Dr. Schaeffer has ever seen, and an athlete with two different sized feet becomes a difficult surgery.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!
programme.desc: Gerard is lumpy, he has nearly a hundred lumps varying in size that coat his entire body. Gina has bloody lesions all over, and nobody has been able to help her. Eric has a large bump on his head that that he calls his "on/off button."

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Supersized: The Record Breaking Lump!
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90 per cent of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: ET Fingers
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent tries to save a man's enormous toe, as Dr. Schaeffer has his hands full treating a little boy with big demands, and a man with incredibly long toes.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Girls Don't Cry

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Rainy Season Mayhem
programme.desc: Warden Eddin comes to the rescue of a woman whose ATV is stuck in the mud and Reneau responds to a call about an abandoned red-tail hawk chick. Meanwhile, an eagle's death is investigated, and a midnight manhunt ensues after a car crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Rainy Season Mayhem
programme.desc: Warden Eddin comes to the rescue of a woman whose ATV is stuck in the mud and Reneau responds to a call about an abandoned red-tail hawk chick. Meanwhile, an eagle's death is investigated, and a midnight manhunt ensues after a car crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Deep: Saurians
programme.desc: The Irwins travel to the waters off Jamaica, Vanuatu and Queensland, Australia, to swim mere inches from the massive jaws of the reptiles that inhabit these deep ocean waters. Steve and Terri search the Galapagos Islands for marine iguanas.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Wildcats
programme.desc: A black and white kitten names Moo goes head to head with a baby skunk. An orange tabby kitten named Gus tries to befriend his canine housemate. An adventurous Savannah kitten tries to find a brave playmate.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: A Scratch from the Past
programme.desc: Jackson works with a guardian, Tara, whose traumatic experience with her previous cat is affecting her currently troubled cat, Cali. Jackson must deal with guardian Kurtis and his cat Kurtis Jr. before the guardian has his feline namesake declawed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The Road Home
programme.desc: Dr. Baier races to save a young couple's cat after it is hit by a truck and Dr. Don operates on a basset hound with an unusual appetite. Also, Dr. Jeff and his team head to Mexico to provide desperately needed vet care to the community.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hog Wild and Home Free
programme.desc: The time has come for Dr. Ross and Tauvia to move out of his momma's house. Dr. Lavigne makes a life or death decision with Diesel, a mastiff who could have a toy lodged in his intestines. Dr. Blue sees a pig with an affection for household furniture.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: High Risk Pregnancy
The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: When a tornado tears through New Orleans, Tania takes charge but is furious when the parolees fail to show up to help. A fellow pit bull trainer seeks Tia's help adopting a dog she can put to work.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Long Time Coming
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, Tia and team try to nurse a dog back to health in one of the worse cases of neglect they have ever seen. And, ten years after Hurricane Katrina, one of the survivors finally has a shot at forever home. Includes a special Aftershow.

programme.title: Movie: Sparkle
programme.desc: In the 1960s, three sisters form a girl group and soon become local sensations with major label interest, but fame becomes a challenge as the close-knit family begins to fall apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fences
programme.desc: In 1950s Pittsburgh, a former Negro League player works as a waste collector to provide for his family. Struggling to keep his family afloat, he takes his frustrations out on his wife and son. He realizes he has to face his regrets for his family.

programme.title: Movie: The Single Moms Club
programme.desc: Five single moms from different walks of life are forced together to participate in a fundraiser when their kids are caught spray-painting a wall at school. They decide to form a support group for single mothers to help face everyday challenges.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret

programme.title: Martin: I Saw Gina Kissing Santa Claus

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: 72 Hours

programme.title: The Parkers: Et Tu, Andell?

programme.title: Black-ish: Purple Rain
programme.desc: The family is shocked to learn that Jack and Diane are not familiar with the iconic music of Prince. One by one, each member of the family works to explain Prince’s tremendous impact on their lives through his music.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Grief
programme.desc: Bow's mom, Alicia, visits the family for the first time since the loss of Bow's dad, and she is still heavily grieving. Bow decides to throw a big luau-themed party for what would have been her dad's next birthday.

programme.title: Black-ish: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: The twins opt out of the family Halloween costume for fear it will hurt their social status in middle school. Dre and Bow take it upon themselves to protect them from bullies by putting together the best haunted house and invite the whole seventh grade.

programme.title: Black-ish: Friends Without Benefits
programme.desc: Bow makes a new friend at work and Dre thinks she has broken bird syndrome. Meanwhile, Junior transforms his shared room with Jack into a frat house and Ruby and Diane gang up against them.

programme.title: Black-ish: Christmas in Theater Eight
programme.desc: The Johnsons have a tradition of going to the movies on Christmas and they can never agree on what to see. Dre wants to see an important film about Rosa Parks, but they all want to see the latest action-packed superhero blockbuster.

programme.title: Black-ish: Stand Up, Fall Down

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen
programme.desc: Dre must take Jack and Diane on a mandatory camping trip for school and hatches a plan for them to escape to a fancy hotel for some pampering.

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in A Minor
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: New Jersey Getaway for New Parents
programme.desc: Philadelphia parents want to introduce their baby to the beach and have set their sights on Brigantine, New Jersey. Although this coastal community is considered pricey, they're determined to find the perfect place to spend summers with family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Leaving a Legacy
programme.desc: A couple with three kids looks for a vacation home in Ocean City, MD. They both grew up enjoying life on the water and want to give their kids those same memories. Hoping to leave a legacy for them, they're looking to invest in a property near the ocean.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Mother Knows Best When Buying a Beach House
programme.desc: Melissa, a realtor, is a pro at locating the perfect homes for her clients. Now, the tables have turned as she searches for her own family dream house in Crystal Beach, Texas.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Abort Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a promising deal in Long Beach, California. Since the property is currently tenant-occupied, they can't inspect inside the house and their decision to buy will have to be made based on what they can see from the car.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beached Bungalow
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a charming bungalow home on the edge of a historic Long Beach, California, neighbourhood. Christina loves the period details and design, while Tarek loves that the good condition of the interior could mean savings in the budget.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Trickle Down Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home for sale in Chino, California that's rundown, overgrown and in desperate need of cosmetic help.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pigeonhole Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in Santa Ana, California. They work to modernize the house as much as possible to appeal to the modern-day buyer, but with every challenge comes many problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: When strange additions and design challenges collide, this quick flip turns out to be harder than anticipated.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Unpermitted Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, CA, that's jam-packed with issues. There's a large pool in a small backyard, and unexpected additions create problems they've never seen before.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: The Fab Life: A New Kitchen For an Old Friend

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: The Fab Life: Master Suite Makeover
programme.desc: A couple's master suite is in desperate need of a makeover. Christina comes to the rescue, turning the dingy, dated bathroom and bedroom into a chic and functional space.

programme.desc: Andrew invests his own money to buy a large, neglected house in Escondido, CA, in hopes of flipping it for profit. Meanwhile, Seth and Mia explore San Diego to find their new clients, and their adorable dog, a luxury condo.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Too Small to Fail

programme.desc: The murder of a husband and father exposes a scandalous love triangle and triggers an investigation into one of the town's wealthiest residents.

programme.title: Snapped: Kari Willoughby

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy McKay

programme.title: Dateline: What They Saw
programme.desc: A Georgia father accused of murdering his ex-wife speaks. His friends come together to prove he's innocent while prosecutors count on his young children to testify against their own father.

programme.title: Dateline: The Threat
programme.desc: In 1988, a mother of four is murdered in her home. Police suspect her husband but it takes 14 before he's convicted. Another inmate revealed that he's issued a death threat on the prosecutor and when he's granted parole, it's feared he could kill again.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Detour

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Killer in Plain Sight

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: New Mexico Massacre
programme.desc: A beloved couple and their special needs son are savagely murdered in rural New Mexico, leading detectives to uncover long buried secrets in a tight-knit town.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Intentions
programme.desc: When a devoted mother about to embark on a new life is murdered in her own home, detectives follow the evidence through a tangled web of relationships to unmask a killer no one could have predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: When a loving father and beloved basketball coach is ruthlessly murdered in Tennessee, police decode a confusing array of evidence to unveil a killer who is shockingly close to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Client

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House On Sidney's Cove

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck

programme.title: Cajun Justice: The Great Swamp Escape
programme.desc: When expensive shrimping nets are stolen, a swamp chase ensues in which the culprit, Deputy Thibodeaux's nephew, manages to escape.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Lost in the Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Keith Bergeron goes deep in the bayou to check out a report of someone burning trash, but finds himself outnumbered by several angry locals.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Hunt for the Swamp Monster

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bug Off
programme.desc: Deputy Tom Arnold is called down the bayou to investigate a man disturbing his neighbours.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Shadow Walker
programme.desc: Sandi Musk thinks dating Andy LeFleur is a welcomed distraction from her ongoing divorce. But when it becomes clear he wants more than she's ready to give, she tries to call things off. Thing is, this is one guy who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cooking with Fire
programme.desc: After leaving a violent ex-husband and firing a problem employee, 21-year-old Cathy Whitehead is happy to build a life with the man of her dreams. But when a stranger shows up on her doorstep one night, she's soon caught up in the web of a familiar foe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: 19-year-old Micah Rineis striking out on her own when she falls for fellow college student Thomas Pate. But when their love takes her far away from family and friends, Micah begins to wonder who she can really trust.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Nightmare in North Dakota
programme.desc: After a blizzard, a son visits his parents, only to find them heinously murdered. Detectives discover a crime scene hopelessly compromised. They soon cross paths with a peculiar local, who may know what happened during the snowstorm.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Dead of Night: He Shouldn't Be With Us
programme.desc: A woman's attempt to flee a troubled relationship leads to her demise. Police discover a haunting message left behind, but the case goes cold for years until a prime suspect's macabre desire for blood is revealed.

programme.title: Dead of Night: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: A convenience store clerk working the graveyard shift is on edge after a string of grisly murders are committed within blocks of her store. Soon, her worst nightmare becomes reality when she comes face to face with a twisted and deranged serial killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: November 2014, Tiffanie Adams' body is found in a field. A small town sheriff must retrace the expectant mom's steps to catch a cold blooded killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Killer Chemistry
programme.desc: Professor Tiffany Maher is a faculty favorite; intelligent and sociable, it's hard to believe that she could have any enemies. But when Tiffany is murdered, investigators discover a secret online life that may lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Police find a cast of dangerous characters and uncover a heinous plot in the murder of a single mother.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Decoding a Murder
programme.desc: It was a case that haunted Lancaster, Pennsylvania: the 1992 murder of teacher Christy Mirack. More than two decades later, a new breed of detective would help break the case, using DNA in a whole new way. And unmasking a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: 20/20: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: Two teenage sisters disappear amid their parents' bitter divorce battle. Their mother denies any involvement, but their father claims she knows more than she's letting on. When the girls turn up nearly three years later, will the truth finally come out?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Bad Blood
programme.desc: There's no body. No murder weapon. But police believe a beloved wife and mother is dead and that the killer is her husband, who insists he's innocent. Prosecutors take him to court four times, trying to unravel the truth about a haunting disappearance.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Green-eyed Monsters
programme.desc: For these heartless women envy is the deadliest sin. An obsessed mistress sacrifices her lover's wife; a young lover kills her girlfriend to keep her from the arms of another; and an angry cowgirl destroys her ex's life by destroying his family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Benefits
programme.desc: These deadly women discovered that death isn't always full of sorrow but sometimes has 'benefits.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Have and to Kill
programme.desc: When some brides vowed to love and honor their husbands, they lied. These Deadly Women made a mockery of marital commitment. They only promised 'To Have and To Kill.'

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor

programme.title: First Time Flippers: On a Limb

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Praying for An Easy Flip
programme.desc: Two pastors at the same church flip a house in Muskegon, MI. One has prior renovation experience and is confident he can lead the charge while the other is hoping to learn new skills along the way.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Quick Flip or Slow Drip?
programme.desc: A competitive couple's project starts strong but unforeseen plumbing issues lead to a near flood in the basement, causing the panicked couple to question if they can pull through at all.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Rebuilder's Remorse
programme.desc: A husband recruits the help of his wife to flip their first home in Grand Forks, ND. She loves demo but things get tricky when it comes time for rebuild. He realizes he might not have the best partner to navigate the waters of the rebuild process.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Shirley Is Serious
programme.desc: Sisters Shirley and Rose are flipping their first house in a Boston suburb. Rose takes the lead naturally, but Shirley grows increasingly worried as certain projects seem to spiral out of control.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Slow and Unsteady
programme.desc: A quick two-month flip is delayed fivefold when unforeseen structural issues are discovered during demo. Under the gun, the couple's priorities split when she decides to focus on intricate salvage projects while he's left with some major undertakings.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Busy parents attempt their first flip in Kettering, OH, but things get hectic balancing life at home, their landscaping business and the flip's short schedule. When he's constantly pulled away with his day job, she's worried they won't be able to finish.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: From Temporary to Permanent
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen begin on the foundation, but their nail gun goes on the fritz and the posts aren't level. Dog mushers Paige and Cody run low on supplies. Mike and Teresa work on their foundation with a damaged excavator.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Hill Crest Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew extract a fireclay tub and window frame from a bed and breakfast. The crew also picks through a large auto graveyard. Key finds include a fire truck, a vintage cooler, and PBR sign.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lakeside Marina
programme.desc: The crew travel to Smith Mountain Lake to save parts off a sinking boat. While at the marina, they discover other boats on the property to salvage. At the warehouse, Mike builds a commissioned bar from wine barrels for a local winery.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Geyser Gulch at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items this time include a birdhouse, oversized frying pans, and water guns. Back at the warehouse, Mike builds a garden arbor out of two doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: P.A. Denny Riverboat
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a calliope from a riverboat in Parkersburg, WV. They also split into teams to pick through the owner's large warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wheeling Apartment
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the rest of the team salvage elements from an apartment building in Wheeling, WV. Key items include arched doors, a double drain board sink and wooden medallions.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Robeson County Jail
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the Dawgs salvage a 1950s jail in Lumberton, NC. Key items include a holding cell, sinks, and slate countertops. At the shop, Mike and Tay build a bar from bowling alley flooring.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Old Navy Ship in Norfolk, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew salvage parts off a former navy ship, the USS Zuni/ USCG Tamaroa. Key finds include an officer's table, portholes, and wooden ship frames. At the warehouse, Mike builds a table from an airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Elks National Home
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to the Elks National Home in Bedford, VA, to salvage parts of the old lodge. Back in the woodshop, Mike builds a swing from a salvaged apple crate and upholsters cushions from old postal bags.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The 100th Episode
programme.desc: The builders celebrate their100th episode by looking back at their favourite moments from the series. They share some secrets, some lessons and some hilarious behind-the scenes-moments.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: From Texas to Tennessee: A Look Back
programme.desc: Mark Bowe looks back at an amazing season of Barnwood Builders. From Texas to Tennessee and from Ohio to the crew's home in West Virginia, this was a season full of big surprises with new faces, new places and a brand new Boneyard.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Dark Fairytale Cake

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Mummyfest Destiny/ Bandages of Brothers
programme.desc: Pedro's amulet has the ability to stop time, ensuring he's always first up at the buffet. When Mavis attempts to use it, however, trouble ensues. Since Pedro and Hank aren't getting along, Mavis and Wendy suggest they look for new roommates.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Dungeon
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Brain Drain
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Miles Morales discover Doc Ock, whose mind has been hiding inside the metal body of The Living Brain, has been behind the mysterious bounty for Spider-Man's head.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Explosive Flames! Revive Phoenix!
programme.desc: Aiger’s search for Fubuki leads him to the gym of the world-renowned Raging Bulls! Aiger and friends quickly learn that, thanks to his training under the one and only Shu Kurenai, Fubuki is not the same Blader he was before.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New Orleans
programme.desc: Nate experiences the city's continued post-Katrina rebirth through some of its most iconic dining establishments, and witnesses the economic and opportunity struggles that still exist. The integration in the Superdome also takes center stage.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Cleveland
programme.desc: A local restaurateur guides Nate through the resurgent city as he explores a social-minded culinary school and the revitalization of a local high school football field. An exploration of second chances, working class struggle and community policing.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New York
programme.desc: A slam poet takes Nate to a special school that infuses music and scientific learning, and a Harlem barber fights gentrification with a unique entrepreneurial approach. Players from the Giants and Jets combat homelessness and inequality.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Miami
programme.desc: Nate joins a Miami Dolphin to explore police outreach in the community, and dives with military vets to examine an effort to save coral reefs. The long season's journey concludes at the site of Super Bowl LIV.

programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: Movie: 54

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.desc: Based on a real heist, a story about the process of pulling off a robbery, the interpersonal relationships of the thieves and the startling outcome.

programme.title: Movie: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: Frank Castle's overzealous vengeance creates an archenemy out of misjudgement. Trying to leave it all behind, Frank hangs up his guns and tries to lead the semblance of the normal life. But Jigsaw hasn't forgotten and wants his turn at vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: SuperGrid

programme.title: Movie: X-Men Origins: Wolverine

programme.title: Movie: Pulp Fiction

programme.title: Movie: Venom

programme.title: Power: Not Exactly How We Planned

programme.title: Power: Whoever He Is
programme.desc: Ghost and Tommy respond to the attacks on their drug business. Ghost's wife Tasha laments his new club career, and Ghost rekindles his relationship with Angela, a US Attorney chasing Ghost's distributor.

programme.title: Power: This Is Real
programme.desc: The club's future becomes jeopardized. The rift between Ghost and Tasha over the nightclub widens. Ghost is reminded that pursuing Angela, and a legit life, could endanger his family.

programme.title: Power: Who Are You
programme.desc: Ghost and Tommy gather their network of gang leaders while Angela plans surveillance for the same meeting. The mystery assailant strikes again. Ghost admits to Angela that he's married with children.

programme.title: Power: I Gotta Go
programme.desc: Concerned over Ghost's attitude, Tasha interferes with club business. Ghost and Angela pursue their affair. Tommy pursues a club employee.

programme.title: Power: Who You With?
programme.desc: Tommy makes peace with Ruiz while Angela wires one of Ruiz's gang members. Ghost forgets Tasha's birthday. Ghost and Angela confront the reality of their affair.

programme.title: Power: Loyalty
programme.desc: Tasha sees Angela for the first time. Ghost learns a friend may be behind the hits while Angela races to stop the next attack. Ghost makes a commitment to Angela. The mastermind behind the hits is revealed.

programme.title: Power: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Ghost plans a huge party at Truth, hoping to expand out of NYC and the drug world. Ghost makes a big decision in an attempt to achieve his dream of going legit.

programme.title: Power: Consequences
programme.desc: Ghost picks up the pieces at Truth after the botched murder attempt against him, while recommitting to the drug game. Tommy disappears after learning that Angela's with the feds.

programme.title: Power: No Friends on the Street
programme.desc: Tommy agrees to help Ghost expand the drug business under one condition, Ghost uses Angela to discover what she knows about them. Kanan's release from jail is a surprise for Ghost.

programme.title: Power: Like We're Any Other Couple
programme.desc: Ghost finally takes Angela to Miami. They live the fantasy of being a couple, but the reality of her investigation destroys it. Back in New York, Tommy and Kanan become close.

programme.desc: The team identifies the remains of a victim after an explosion but discover the man they thought was dead is actually alive. Meanwhile, Booth takes on a desk assignment so Sweets is given a temporary partner.

programme.title: Movie: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: In high school, Bob Stone was a bullied geek and Calvin was popular. Years later, Bob returns as a lethal CIA agent that needs Calvin, who's now an accountant, to help solve a major case. The two enter a world of espionage that could get them killed.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: Draft Day
programme.desc: The general manager of the Cleveland Browns gets the opportunity to rebuild his team on the day of the NFL Draft, when he trades for the number one pick. He must decide what he's willing to sacrifice as he strives to build the perfect team.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: After a stolen navy-issued gun is found to belong to a Chief Petty officer who died 40 years ago, the team reopens the cold case, one that Wade has tracked and investigated for years. Also, the team prepares for their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: Movie: Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: A hotel handyman tells fantastical bedtime stories to his niece and nephew. Suddenly, they start to magically come true and change the world around them. In attempt to change his life, he starts to change the stories to try and make his dreams come true.

programme.title: Movie: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
programme.desc: A Portokalos family secret brings the characters back for an even bigger wedding.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Movie: Deep Impact
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Movie: Elysium
programme.desc: A man takes on a mission to try and bring equality to the polarized worlds of the future.

programme.title: Movie: The Green Mile
programme.desc: Death row guards at a penitentiary form an unusual relationship with an inmate who seems to possess extraordinary powers. They are faced with a moral dilemma when they come to believe the inmate may actually be innocent.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Captain Richard Phillips and his crew had their ship hijacked by Somali pirates in 2009. Witness the story of the first American cargo ship hijacking in 200 years.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt must go to Australia to destroy a disease created by a terrorist group made to wipe out and infect the world.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo
programme.desc: Jake disappears with the daughter of Charlie's neighbour, a former NFL player, and Charlie is left to cover his back. Meanwhile, Alan scores a hot date with the help of Charlie's Mercedes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: He Smelled the Ham, He Got Excited
programme.desc: Evelyn offers to pay for Jake's college education, leaving Alan to wonder if he ever needs to work again.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Devil's Lube
programme.desc: One of Charlie's old partners in crime dies, leaving Charlie to re-evaluate his own reckless lifestyle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thank God for Scoliosis
programme.desc: Charlie and Jake fight for the affections of a waitress, while Alan fights the sexual tension between him and his receptionist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think You Offended Don
programme.desc: Judith is pregnant with a baby girl and Alan is convinced that he is the father. Meanwhile, Jake is in a contentious mood and Charlie thinks he knows why.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: David Copperfield Slipped Me a Roofie
programme.desc: Convinced that Alan's family doesn't fully appreciate him, Melissa invites him to live with her and her mom.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I'd Like to Start With the Cat
programme.desc: Charlie finds himself in couples counselling.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: She'll Still Be Dead at Halftime
programme.desc: Charlie has to remove a half-naked woman from his bedroom before Chelsea arrives and catches him with another woman.

programme.title: Movie: Anaconda
programme.desc: A snake expert dupes a film team into helping him search for a 40-foot long snake.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Captain Richard Phillips and his crew had their ship hijacked by Somali pirates in 2009. Witness the story of the first American cargo ship hijacking in 200 years.

programme.title: Movie: The Green Mile
programme.desc: Death row guards at a penitentiary form an unusual relationship with an inmate who seems to possess extraordinary powers. They are faced with a moral dilemma when they come to believe the inmate may actually be innocent.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.desc: While on vacation, a girl discovers love and romance with a local dance instructor.

programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A woman's mother is obsessed with her lack of love life and secretly sets her up with who she sees as the perfect man, but she just wants to run her restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: Cooking With Love
programme.desc: Fun with a side of love ensues as a television producer and a cook are paired on a children's cooking show.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.title: Movie: Flip That Romance
programme.desc: Rival house-flippers find themselves in a renovation face-off when they are both assigned two halves of a duplex to renovate. They attempt to out-renovate each other, every-step of the way, which leads to an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Movie: October Kiss
programme.desc: Around Halloween, a woman is hired as temporary nanny by a widowed, work-obsessed executive. She reaches out to teach him and his two young children what is important in life, unconditional love.

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: A young celebrity marriage counselor is left at the altar of her own publicized wedding. To save face, she accepts an offer from her contractor, who steps in as a groom and marries her.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A struggling NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a national celebration.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: A woman is left penniless after her divorce, and though she wants nothing more than to return to her high-class life, spending time with her father in her hometown causes her to see things differently.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp

programme.title: South Park: Put It Down

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love

programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling

programme.title: Married at First Sight: In Seasickness and in Health
programme.desc: Four pairs of newlyweds make the most of their honeymoon with a romantic catamaran trip, while one couple remains on shore to heal their fractured marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Pregnant at 17
programme.desc: A woman meets the 17-year-old girl her husband was having an affair with and discovers she is pregnant. She decides to help her out but when a dark figure from the girl's past returns, it puts all three of them in danger, including the baby.

programme.title: Movie: The Good Mistress
programme.desc: A young woman recovering from alcoholism gets caught up in a small town scandal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: That's Gonna Leave a Mark

programme.title: The Substitute: Rico and Raini Rodriguez

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rosita Dies
programme.desc: Phoebe's first day as a telemarketer turns bizarre when she meets her distraught manager.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: The gang reflects on their goofy experiences when they celebrate Rachel's 30th birthday.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's New Brain
programme.desc: A soap opera diva becomes romantically involved with Joey; Rachel and Phoebe compete.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Truth About London
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly recall how their relationship changed during the London trip.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Monica has to fight a fellow bride-to-be for a unique wedding dress.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Award

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin
programme.desc: The arrival of Ross and Monica's cousin causes serious distractions for all the men.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel wonders if she should confront her sorority sister about a drunken college kiss.

programme.title: Mom: Patient Zero and the Chocolate Fountain
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie's contentious relationship makes them unwelcome guests wherever they go.

programme.title: Mom: Fun Girl Stuff and Eternal Salvation
programme.desc: Christy blames Bonnie when Roscoe announces he wants to go live with his father.

programme.title: Mom: Terrorists and Gingerbread
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie have different ideas about forgiveness when Bonnie's mother, Shirley, who abandoned her as a small child, suddenly wants to be part of their lives.

programme.title: Mom: Thigh Gap and a Rack of Lamb
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie try to help Jodi, a teenage addict they met at their meeting.

programme.title: George Lopez: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: When George discovers that his father could be alive, he sets out to find him.

programme.title: George Lopez: Token of Unappreciation
programme.desc: George learns the meaning of company loyalty when he's offered a job by a competitor.

programme.title: George Lopez: Show Dyslexic The
programme.desc: George is forced to admit something embarrassing about himself in order to help Max .

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble / The Way of the Sponge
programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer
programme.desc: Pearl goes through a growth spurt; after showering, SpongeBob gets stuck in his wringer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles. SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.desc: With a missing contractor and a horrible granite disaster, Scott battles the odds to survive a flip that could cost him a fortune.

programme.desc: When the team finds a ramshackle house down the street from a brand-new school opening in a couple months, they see a chance to cash in by creating a family-friendly oasis.
