programme.desc: Justin and Ashlee are ready for the challenge of flipping a home that Duke and Keith don't think is salvageable. Lacking contractors and dealing with a squatter, the pair needs Duke and Keith's help to complete this tricky home makeover.

programme.title: Alaska PD: Love and Hate in Alaska
programme.desc: In Kotzebue, Sgt. Norman Hughes and Officer Robert Odom grapple with the distrust of the police as they try to keep the community safe. In Fairbanks, two officers bring a personal touch in dealing with alcohol and drug-fueled crime.

programme.title: Alaska PD: There's the Good, the Bad and Then There's Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska is home to many people who live by their own rules. That means law enforcement must deal with quirky characters of all kinds on a daily basis. Some are good, some are bad and some are downright hilarious.

programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ladies Obstacles
programme.desc: The Ladies of Laff Mobb countdown life's funniest obstacles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ladies Obstacles
programme.desc: The Ladies of Laff Mobb countdown life's funniest obstacles.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Up All Night
programme.desc: The hilarious Sydney Castillo wants that old thing back, aka his hair. Plus, funny woman Rachel Feinstein has her hands full on a playdate, and the hysterical Mark Viera feels the spirit of the wildcat in his new kicks.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Crazy in Love
programme.desc: Brad Williams brings the heat, 'Street Fighter' style, Sydnee Washington has a hot date with Father Time, Yamaneika daydreams about being kidnapped, and Calvin Evans gets less than he bargained for on his no-frills plane ticket.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Incredibly Unsettling
programme.desc: At a health store in Chicago, Michael proves you are what you drink, and later at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Holy Moly Mirror
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term 'hold the pickles.' Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at Humboldt Park.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: It's a Chicken, Sir
programme.desc: Michael discovers a ferocious new breed of animal at a park, invades a local tea shop, and transforms himself at an abandoned art studio.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!
programme.desc: Michael shows a caterer the true power of dairy products, and an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite chews through the scenery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Similar Rock Energy
programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago hashing out new ideas at a hemp store, inspecting spooky churches and teaming up with special guest star, Jack Black.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Faux Pas to Wear
programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: It's a Makeshifte
programme.desc: Find out why Michael had to get scorpion training, what animal the crew chased around a store and where Michael's favourite vacation spots are.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ladies Obstacles
programme.desc: The Ladies of Laff Mobb countdown life's funniest obstacles.

programme.desc: Gina Yashere headlines as Neko White has a run-in with the new Sherriff in town. Plus, Alex Scott teaches how to take cover and Tacarra Williams gets a fight in her son's bedroom.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Locked Booth
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The House at Deadman's Curve
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave head to Dover, Delaware, to help a local paranormal investigator with her childhood home. The investigation uncovers evidence that the haunting may be connected to a deadly stretch of road just yards from the property.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Ghosts From the Battlefield
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave investigate claims of possessed mannequins and strange apparitions haunting a property just outside of Gettysburg, Pennsylvania. They soon discover that spirits aren't the only things slithering around the house.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Haunting of Weems Plantation
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave investigate strange noises and unnerving apparitions inside a pre-Civil War home in Locust Grove, Georgia. They uncover evidence that the haunting could be related to the evil plantation owner who once lived on the property.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Trail of Terrors
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave take on a case in McMinnville, Tennessee, where a woman believes paranormal phenomena in her home is affecting her health. Their investigation reveals the area's connection to the Trail of Tears could be to blame for the activity.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The Apparition of Amelia
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave investigate claims of horrific apparitions lurking inside a rural home in Brooktondale, New York. Their research reveals a series of tragic farming accidents could be to blame for the disturbing paranormal activity.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Revolutionary Soldier and Creature in the Woods
programme.desc: Three sisters get more than they bargained for when they decide to take photos in a graveyard at night, and a young family's day hike turns into a nightmare when they are terrorized by an unknown creature in the woods.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: The Hell Hound
programme.desc: A woman encounters an uneasy presence while exploring an abandoned Ohio hospital. She quickly flees, but little does she know the entity has latched onto her and is stalking her through the woods surrounding her home.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Haunted Cabin
programme.desc: A couple's idyllic retirement home quickly turns into their worst nightmare after they are tormented by a spirit that once called their little cabin in the woods home.

programme.title: Briarpatch: First Time in Saint Disgrace
programme.desc: Allegra Dill returns to Texas after her sister is murdered.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Pilot
programme.desc: Zoey, an introverted computer programmer living in San Francisco, begins to hear the innermost desires of the people around her through song.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: That Awkward Moment
programme.desc: Three single guys have sworn to remain bachelors in support of their heartbroken friend. As their current conquests become more than flings, the trio is tasked with keeping their relationships under wraps, and must examine just where things are headed.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Greg Proops 1
programme.desc: Guest comedian Greg Proops puts his comedic skills to the test through improv games prompted only by ideas supplied by the studio audience. Points are doled out after each round until a winner is declared.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Gary Anthony Williams 4
programme.desc: Comedian Gary Anthony Williams puts his comedy skills to the test with improv games prompted by ideas supplied by the studio audience. Points are awarded in each round until a winner is crowned.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: A Very MJ Wedding
programme.desc: MJ's wedding unfolds in typical MJ fashion, sprinkled with chaos and complications. The Shahs are forced to confront their own true feelings about marriage and contemplate their futures as the bride attempts to make it down the aisle in one piece.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Reunion Part One
programme.desc: As the reunion kicks off, the Shahs waste no time shaking things up. Newlyweds Mercedes and husband Tommy have life-changing news to share with their friends, but only after they've spoken with Mercedes' opinionated mother, Vida.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Reunion Part Two
programme.desc: The dramatic sit-down continues as the group recounts a series of exhilarating highs and challenging lows. Destiney re-examines the search for her father and shares what she found out about him. Nema and Golnesa come clean about their flirtation.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Constellation Code
programme.desc: Throughout the ancient world, structures were built to mirror the constellations in the night sky--and, in most cases, this is only apparent when they are viewed from high above the Earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Return to Gobekli Tepe
programme.desc: Modern archaeologists are having to rethink humanity's past thanks to the ancient site of Gobekli Tepe. The complex was constructed 6,500 years before Stonehenge and 5,000 years before the first signs of civilization in Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Science Wars
programme.desc: Nearly every year discoveries are made that require revisions to history books. But there are numerous artifacts that are outright ignored because they don't fit into the accepted scientific paradigm. Explore some of these artifacts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Ancient Engineers
programme.desc: Take a look at whether the tools of ancient builders could have come from aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Third Reich
programme.desc: During World War II, there were reports that the Germans built an operational flying saucer, known as the Hanebu, which was said to use mythical technology found in ancient Indian texts. Take a look at whether Hitler was aided by aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Old West
programme.desc: Theorists believe aliens have been visiting earth for thousands of years. In Texas, Utah, Arizona and southern California, there are many old stories that point to the existence of aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Temples of Gold
programme.desc: Locals in Cusco, Peru believe UFO sightings are connected to lost gold at the bottom of Lake Puray.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Tech
programme.desc: Ancient texts and art suggest ancient humans had what could be interpreted as alien encounters. Take a look at whether ancient peoples possessed scientific knowledge beyond that of our own century.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch has a dangerous secret: he has an insatiable appetite for women. He collects them as he does exotic cars, but unlike cars, he stashes them in his various properties, hiding them from one another, and especially his wife.

programme.title: Body Cam: High Stakes

programme.title: Body Cam: Up Against the Clock
programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.desc: A Detective leads his heavily armed team on a search warrant but ends up in the firing line himself; a routine traffic stop turns violent as the suspect makes a risky getaway; a knife wielding man draws police into a dangerous foot chase.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Breaking Point
programme.desc: He devoted his life to helping people and upholding the law. But somewhere along the way, he turned from savior to monster. Then, a match made in hell. And when envy is pitted against pride, it's a battle to the death.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Prey for Me
programme.desc: In Washington State, a greedy pastor decides that one woman just isn't enough, and fills his odious appetite with the ladies in his congregation. Later, a single mother finds love with a young man carrying a troubled past, only to be torn away by sin.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Signs on Their Bodies
programme.desc: In 1987, the lifeless, mutilated bodies of multiple women began appearing around Delaware. The horrific deaths were the work of the state's first serial killer. The hunt for him would lead investigators down a dark road, that no one would soon forget.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Her Mother's Secrets
programme.desc: Loretta Bowersock is dropped off at a mall for a day of shopping, but never seen again. Investigators struggle to come up with a suspect, until they discover that Loretta had a secret that shocks her loved ones, and may finally explain her disappearance.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Beyond the Grave
programme.desc: Wife and mother Sandra Duyst appears to have it all. Yet what few know is that Sandra struggles with crippling depression. Her death appears as a suicide, but a message from beyond the grave sends the investigation into a strange and unexpected direction.

programme.title: See No Evil: Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Bright young college student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The family's search for their 19-year-old daughter hits every dead end... until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery. The cops search for the person who set fire to this loving mother of three.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Twisted Love: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: A married father of two engages in an affair with his wife's first cousin, a love triangle that will lead to one very murderous twist.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Work on a Crab Boat
programme.desc: Kenneth 'Speedy' Raulerson is wanted in Florida for armed robbery. He flees to Alaska to work the crab boats. After six months, he returns to the backwoods of Florida. Raulerson knows he will eventually be caught and is prepared to go down fighting.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 4th Street House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on a boarded up, previously condemned 1880s duplex and restores it into a single-family home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Detroit Auction House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis wins a house sight-unseen at auction and plans to revitalize the eyesore with painting, landscaping and restoring the custom woodwork. She faces a challenge when replacing missing details, including original windows and hardwood flooring.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Love Yurts: The Big Kahuna Yurt
programme.desc: Yurt builders Nathan and Jenny Toler are headed deep into the jungles of Maui, Hawaii, to build their biggest yurt yet. It's a giant two-story, 30-foot, hydro-powered yurt for their off-the-grid clients Christina and Boe.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Build Begins
programme.desc: After years spent traveling and working around the globe, Jon and Etta Smith are settling down with their 18-month-old daughter, Syndi. In one of the most remote corners of northwestern Montana, they are building a home and bison ranch off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Race Against Winter
programme.desc: Jon and Etta Smith's build is under way, and they're working to balance ranch and build duties. In Montana's northwest, they have little time to waste, winter is severe, and it's coming fast.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Bison Comes Home
programme.desc: Jon and Etta are in a race against time on their Montana house build, but it's not just the house that has them working around the clock: they're also building a bison ranch from the ground up.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Montana Time
programme.desc: Jon and Etta Smith have built their off-the-grid house from the foundation up to the roof, but this late into the winter, they're forced to deal with bitter cold and high winds every day.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work
programme.desc: In a mad dash to finish the exterior of their house before another big Montana storm hits, Jon and Etta's interior work has been put on hold. With cold temperatures and little daylight to work with, every baby step they make is a victory in its own right.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Dreams Become Reality
programme.desc: After construction delays pushed construction into the dead of winter, Jon and Etta Smith are nearing the end of the build. The finishing touches, including the custom stone fireplace, solar panels, and furniture are put into place.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Mary Poppins
programme.desc: Four bakers compete to serve their cakes at a party for the 'Mary Poppins' musical.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Cake, Glorious Cake
programme.desc: Nine of America's elite professional bakers gather to begin the first in a series of 14 challenges.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Wedding Spectacular
programme.desc: The remaining eight bakers are charged with making perfect wedding-themed mini mousse cakes.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Summer Desserts
programme.desc: The seven remaining bakers begin by making perfect strawberry shortcake in the Skills Challenge.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: East Coast Classics
programme.desc: Six bakers remain as they attempt to create flawless mini Boston cream pies. For the Master Challenge, the task is to bake their version of the ultimate New York cheesecake.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Magnificent Meringue
programme.desc: The five remaining bakers make mini meringue pies. In the Master Challenge, they must feature raspberry flavour in a French layered meringue cake.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Old School Classics
programme.desc: The final four bakers' Skills Challenge is to make historic Mont Blanc cakes, which are tarts topped with a tower of chestnut paste.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Chocolate Crescendo
programme.desc: The finale is all about the world's most beloved ingredient- chocolate. In the Skills Challenge, the three remaining bakers must create a perfect version of a glazed Austrian chocolate cake.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Alfonso says it's okay to play with your food, especially these tasty treats! From super-sized Fatboy ice cream sandwiches to super-seasoned Wise Onion rings to playful Melville candy glitter mustache lollipops.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Love is in the Air
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro gets the lowdown on the sweet messages imprinted on Necco's classic Sweet Hearts and how the Perfect Bite packs so much flavor into their Caramelized Onion and Feta Pastry Kisses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The secrets behind Necco's Slapstix lollipops and Long Grove Confectionary's Toffee.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sugar and Spice
programme.desc: It's sugar and spice and everything nice as host Alfonso Ribeiro shows how Sriracha hot sauce and Tina's Chimichangas amp up the spice factor in their tasty treats.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat in Music City
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the country music capital Nashville, where chefs are playing meaty tunes. At Urban Grub, Chef Edgar Pendley fans the flames in a massive 18-foot-tall hearth and hangs a wall of house-made andouille sausages and pork ribs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Art of Darkness
programme.desc: Alton Brown delves into the dark world of chocolate.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Nazis: Ultimate Evil

programme.desc: When Buddy the Bunny goes missing on the Muppet Babies Express, Summer Penguin sets out to find him. Mr. Manny steps in for Miss Nanny when she runs an errand.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Feelings
programme.desc: Disney music shorts to help children prepare for preschool.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine's Day Mix-Up / A Stinky Story

programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: The Paul Finebaum Show
programme.desc: Paul Finebaum of ESPN Radio takes calls and discusses SEC football.

programme.title: Gymnastics
programme.desc: Women's

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Sarah and Suzanne
programme.desc: Alabama's Sarah Patterson and Georgia's Suzanne Yoculan took their schools' gymnastics program from the verge of folding to the best in the country.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Lolo Jones
programme.desc: Lori 'Lolo' Jones was a standout hurdler from LSU where she won 3 NCAA titles and 11 All-American honors. Lolo explores her inspiring rise from an unstable home life to national stardom that included a spot on the 2008 United States Olympic team.

programme.title: SEC Storied: By Grantland Rice
programme.desc: There is no more hallowed figure in sports journalism than Grantland Rice, who maintained a ruling perch across the sports world for more than 50 years. This film relives sport's golden era through the eyes of a reporter who had a front row seat.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Thunder and Lightning
programme.desc: Revisiting the fabled Bulldogs and tracking the relationship between Clark and Palmeiro, known as 'Thunder and Lightning.' Director Rory Karpf brings closure to men who should be remembered for what they did and not for what they didn't do.

programme.title: Marty & McGee
programme.desc: Popular radio personalities Marty and McGee meet at the crossroads of southern culture and college football.

programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of Us
programme.desc: The owner of a Romance bookstore runs into her first love, an architect who is overseeing a development that will forever change her neighbourhood. Her nostalgia for her home clashes with his desire for change, but their romantic tension may unite them.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont

programme.title: Movie: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Girls Are Missing
programme.desc: In the winter of 1974, college-age women from the Pacific Northwest began to disappear seemingly without a trace.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: Ted Escapes
programme.desc: While serving time for aggravated kidnapping in Utah and facing first degree murder charges in Colorado, Ted Bundy escaped not once, but twice from authorities.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Murder Trials
programme.desc: Ted Bundy helped prepare his own defense, but would his amateur lawyering help him beat the rap or send him to the electric chair?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Death Row Confessions
programme.desc: Ted Bundy maintains his innocence. But as the clock wound down on his final death warrant, Ted Bundy made a last desperate attempt to save his own life he: began to talk.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit

programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Glass Maker
programme.desc: Mike goes to Jonesboro, Arkansas to perform some research using Dung Beetles, then he heads to Williamstown, West Virginia to try his hand at making some glass art.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reindeer Farm
programme.desc: Mike heads to Kentucky to try shrink wrapping a houseboat, and then he heads off to Alaska to spend the day at a reindeer farm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: High-Rise Window Washer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Hawaii to join the crew of the Worldwide Window Cleaning to help them clean some windows 40 storeys above Honolulu.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Dozer Dave's Comeback
programme.desc: Former Gold Rush miner Dave Turin is back and he's prospecting for an abandoned mine he can reopen. And even when his investor backs out, Dave's prepared to bet it all, including his family's savings, on his ability to strike it rich.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Amateur Antics
programme.desc: Dave Turin continues his big comeback by assembling a team of amateur miners to take on a patch of untested ground in Arizona. Faulty equipment and rookie mistakes stack the odds against him, leading Dave to wonder if he's already lost on his investment.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Dirt-Digging Detective
programme.desc: Dozer Dave experiences a real-life nightmare when the ground he's been mining goes cold. An investigation to find out where the problem lies is launched, leading Dave to find virgin ground that may be his ticket to big money.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Disaster Strikes
programme.desc: Dave's crew is looking good to reach their 100-ounce goal when disaster strikes in the form of an equipment malfunction merely days before their deadline. Dave takes a bold risk that can either shut him down or put him back in business for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Going for the Gold
programme.desc: As he prepares for a new season, Dave gathers his team to go over his mining strategy and lessons learned. Revealing their new prospecting location, he makes the crew a life-changing offer.

programme.desc: Dozer Dave experiences a real-life nightmare when the ground he's been mining goes cold. An investigation to find out where the problem lies is launched, leading Dave to find virgin ground that may be his ticket to big money.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Disaster Strikes
programme.desc: Dave's crew is looking good to reach their 100-ounce goal when disaster strikes in the form of an equipment malfunction merely days before their deadline. Dave takes a bold risk that can either shut him down or put him back in business for good.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Drilling Down: Going for the Gold
programme.desc: As he prepares for a new season, Dave gathers his team to go over his mining strategy and lessons learned. Revealing their new prospecting location, he makes the crew a life-changing offer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Most Extreme Adventures
programme.desc: Josh and crew share ten extreme adventures from filming Expedition Unknown.

programme.title: Tougher Than It Looks: Rescue Work
programme.desc: Andrew sets out to see how tough it is to be a rescue worker. He will first attempt to rescue a dummy from a mangled car using the Jaws of Life, before it explodes in flames. Then he will use a water cannon attached to a Crash Truck.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: The bass bite like crazy as Jimmy and Joe Hall fish in front of a storm.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Peacock Bass on the Amazon
programme.desc: We fish for peacock bass on the Amazon River.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Special Forces Green Beret - Greg Stube
programme.desc: Greg Stube was wounded during Operation Medusa in Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: A Little Help from My Friends
programme.desc: Lain and George fish in the Everglades with radio host Matt Bellinger, and learn about Dolphin's Plus Marine Mammal Rescue.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Cape Eleuthera, Bahamas - Long Range Dolphin!
programme.desc: George and Harry Vernon III take the MARC VI from North Miami Dade's Haulover Inlet to the Cape Eleuthera Resort and Marina.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Fish Gods
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old fly angler, Stevie Kim, joins Jared in Islamorada.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Redfish Restock
programme.desc: CCA Florida's Brian Gorsk joins Rick to tour Duke Energy's redfish restocking center in Crystal River, and teach future generations of anglers about fishing and conservation.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mahogany Ship
programme.desc: Josh searches for the missing Mahogany ship along Australia’s infamous Shipwreck Coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mayan Sacrifice
programme.desc: Luke, a go-getter from Southern California, and Alyssa, a positive survival instructor, take on the rugged coast of the Yucatan. They sruggle to survive dehydration, hunger, and the threat of caiman.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Was Gonna Gag
programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: I Said Yes to the Dress, America!
programme.desc: Randy goes off the grid to surprise Sammi Jo and learns that she's anxious to go dress shopping without her mom. Raeshanda needs a dress fit for a queen for under $2000 or else it's off with their heads!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Do It With Your Boots on!
programme.desc: Randy is putting on his cowboy boots to wrangle up the next bride that will represent her state in America's wedding. Plus, Jessica wants a sleek and sexy Lazaro dress but her entourage is blushing for a ballgown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Mom Is Pulling Strings up There!
programme.desc: Randy heads to the desert to give Lindsey an unforgettable Mothers' Day surprise. Also, Jazmin's shopping with her trio of protective brothers and Lyndzie's afraid her dress won't fit.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Red, White and Randy
programme.desc: Randy surprises one of his biggest fans with an invitation to America's wedding. Emily wants a plain dress but her family begs for more. When Ashley's dress reveals a big issue during alterations, Shay must think quick.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Evil Mom Here
programme.desc: Samantha's already shopped at 100 different bridal stores without ever finding the right dress and her bullying mom is not helping. Last Minute Lia, on the other hand, has never tried a single gown and has to leave with one today.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Will Show You The Door
programme.desc: Bridal model Jessica is depending on her feisty friends to help her make a decision, but when they get out of control Randy has to step in. New mom Marlo is back with her outspoken twin Margo and hopes she can keep her brutally honest comments in check.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Red, White and Randy
programme.desc: Randy surprises one of his biggest fans with an invitation to America's wedding. Emily wants a plain dress but her family begs for more. When Ashley's dress reveals a big issue during alterations, Shay must think quick.
