programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: Spongebob is jellyfishing when he realizes that he wants to fly with the jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Inspongeiac
programme.desc: SpongeBob enlists the help of Patrick to get to sleep, but Patrick can't seem to stay awake.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Naughty Nautical Neighbors/ Boating School
programme.desc: Squidward makes Spongebob and Patrick think they're no longer friends; Boating exams.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: SpongeBob agrees to take Mr. Krab's daughter to the prom; Bob and Squidward battle it out.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fast and the Furriest/ Mascot Melee
programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Registered Nurse
programme.desc: A licensed medic is put to the test and it isn't long before he considers using a cheat.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Astronaut
programme.desc: This contestant has travelled to outer space, so he's confident he can land on $100,000. He blasts through the questions, but feels the pressure along the way. He even considers cheating when he gets lost in the 5th grade.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: The Walls Are Closing In!
programme.desc: The Blair family takes on Maze Master Adam Conover's mind-bending games. They must beat challenges like the Shrinking Room to win a chance at up to $25,000.

programme.title: Paradise Run: A Rockin' Run With Thunder
programme.desc: The stars of 'School of Rock' take on the stars of 'The Thundermans' in a Hawaiian triathlon.

programme.title: Paradise Run: Outrigger Run
programme.desc: Teams of two compete for a grand prize tropical vacation and spending money.

programme.title: Double Dare: Thunderstruck vs. Girl Power
programme.desc: With the help of their teammates, Kira Kosarin takes on Olympian Lindsey Vonn. Though they both aim to win, only one team moves on to run the obstacle course.

programme.title: Double Dare: Team Rico vs. Team Raini
programme.desc: It's a family reunion. Rico Rodriquez and his teammate take on Raini Rodriguez and her partner. It's a sibling rivalry until only one wins and moves forward to the obstacle course.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: That's Gonna Leave a Mark
programme.desc: Two brothers and their three kids unite, determined to defeat challenges like the treacherous Boulder Dash as they try to take home the $25,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: An adult's lack of knowledge is tested on subjects they learned in elementary school.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Doctor
programme.desc: A medical practitioner thinks she has enough degrees to ace elementary school, but she only gets to 2nd grade before she considers using a cheat.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp
programme.desc: Mavis promises to have a spa day with Wendy and have lunch with the werewolf twins at the same time. Mavis wins two tickets to the phlegm ball fantasy camp.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Dungeon
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Foot Club
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drac to the Future
programme.desc: The self-updating tome, The Monstroso Serioso, is on display at Hotel Transylvania. While looking at the book, Kitty Cartwright finds herself sucked into its pages. It's up to Mavis to retrieve Kitty by travelling into the past.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Ace Dragon! On the Rise!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Abracadabra! Wizard Fafnir!
Yo-Kai Watch: Hapyon Detective Agency: Case No. 2: Who Licked My Ice Cream?! / Yo-Kai Mistank
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Exhibition Unmasked!
DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.desc: Break down the keys to victory for Jon Jones and Dominick Reyes ahead of their light heavyweight bout at UFC 247.

programme.desc: Go inside the lives of and training camps of Jon 'Bones' Jones and Dominick Reyes as they prepare for UFC 247.

programme.title: Katy Keene: Chapter One: Once Upon a Time in New York

programme.desc: When a series of events leads Josie, Lizzie and Alaric to the prison world, they come face-to-face with the twins' evil uncle Kai.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Smokes

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Stock Tip

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Daddy Daughter Day

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Booth Babes

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.desc: With only three days left on his probation, Collin is determined to avoid even a small hint of illegal activity, but with his unstable best friend Miles causing trouble the two end up on a collision course that could jeopardize Collin's freedom.

programme.desc: When Mike's dad moves to town to build the new Outdoor Man store, Vanessa is concerned that some of Bud's well-intentioned ways might raise Mike's high blood pressure.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Spotlight
programme.desc: Mike tries to make it up to Vanessa after unintentionally upstaging her announcement about being the school's top volunteer parent. Ed wants to release an action figure based on Mike.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go East on Sunset Until You Reach the Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Charlie takes Alan out on the town after Alan's fun-filled father/son weekend plans backfire. Too many drinks soon lead Charlie and Alan to confront their mother.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If I Can't Write My Chocolate Song, I'm Going to Take a Nap
programme.desc: When Charlie's longtime cleaning lady quits, Alan is sent to lure her back. Meanwhile, Alan asks Charlie to get Jake ready for Judith.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Inappropriate Sister
programme.desc: Phoebe works with the Salvation Army; Rachel questions Danny's closeness to his sister.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Monica's Boots
programme.desc: Chandler is incensed when Monica spends a fortune on a pair of black boots that hurt.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Party Planners
programme.desc: Mike's birthday wish is to have his wife and mother get along, but Molly and Peggy butt heads more than ever as they try to plan his birthday party together. Meanwhile, Samuel and Carl compete for the same woman.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike Can't Read
programme.desc: After learning that Joyce gave up her artistic talents when she became a mother, Molly decides that she and Mike need to pursue new hobbies before becoming parents, so they take up roller skating.

programme.title: Mentoring Kings
programme.desc: Celebrate the national mentoring programs of celebrities, business entrepreneurs, educators, political and community leaders. Explore how these men have become 'mentoring kings' and hear the stories of black men who have played a major role.

programme.title: Founding Mothers
programme.desc: Profiles of several African American women from the Washington, D.C. area who, over the last two centuries, have forged new rights and freedoms for their children, grandchildren, and generations beyond their respective lifetimes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pilot
programme.desc: Commercial jingle writer Charlie Harper is surprised when his uptight brother, Alan, and Alan's 10-year-old son Jake ask to stay temporarily with him at his beach house. Charlie soon bonds with Jake, and the temporary arrangement becomes more permanent.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Flappy Bastards
programme.desc: Charlie gives Jake the cold shoulder after he lures seagulls into the house. Meanwhile, Alan gets a surprise from Judith when he offers to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: Mom: Six Thousand Bootleg T-Shirts and a Prada Handbag
programme.desc: Christy makes a new friend who has big problems. Meanwhile, Bonnie attempts to put someone else's needs ahead of her own.

programme.title: Mom: Abstinence and Pudding
programme.desc: Christy is determined to take things slow in her relationship with Adam. Meanwhile, Bonnie and her rival from AA, Marjorie, disagree on what 'taking it slow' means.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: Highlights uproarious weather-related videos from local stations, broadcasters and more.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather
programme.desc: Highlights uproarious weather-related videos from local stations, broadcasters and more.

programme.title: Wipeout: Back to School: Students' Revenge
programme.desc: For the first time ever, we celebrate our nation's teachers in front of a live audience full of students in a very special Back-to-School episode.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Jeremiah Camara
programme.desc: A discussion with leading freethought authors, thinkers and activists.

programme.title: Elementary: Risk Management
programme.desc: Sherlock agrees to take a case from a man claiming to be Moriarty, hoping it will bring him closer to finding his nemesis. Meanwhile, Gregson encourages Joan to give up the dangerous line of work she has chosen and go back to being a sober companion.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Most Handsome Boy on the Planet
programme.desc: When Barry is approached by a modeling representative in the mall, Barry is convinced he’ll be famous but Erica believes it's a scam so Beverly threatens the modeling rep to give him a gig or else.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: DannyDonnieJoeJonJordan
programme.desc: When falling boxes trap Murray in the garage, he demands that Beverly get rid of everything except for one trunk. When the trunk goes missing, Murray becomes sentimental about what was inside while Erica has trouble parting with her stuff.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: After a Caucus meltdown in Iowa, candidates are cautious going into the New Hampshire Primary.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a father is searching all over town for a toy for his son. While his son is at home wondering where he is, the neighbour is hitting on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Avenue 5: I'm a Hand Model
programme.desc: Ryan proposes an official position for Karen amid growing passenger complaints. Judd reveals a longshot rescue plan while Rav bears the weight of crisis management on Earth.

programme.title: Curb Your Enthusiasm: Artificial Fruit
programme.desc: Larry drops the ball when he gets the chance to make amends with his assistant Alice. Larry and Richard go to extreme lengths for their upcoming lunch date.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie: Gulliver's Travels
programme.desc: A travel writer becomes shipwrecked on an island where he is much taller than the tiny citizens that inhabit it.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Daze
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, a man is convinced he'll never fall in love again. His best friend dares him to propose to a waitress. The dare evolves into the kind of love that both have been looking for all along.

programme.title: HBO Comedy Half Hour: Judy Gold
Movie: Out to Sea
programme.desc: A lighthearted senior convinces his friend to pose as a dance host on a party cruise.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Get Over It
programme.desc: After being dumped by his girlfriend, a high school basketball star fights to win her back through any means possible. With the help of his friend's sister, he joins the school musical in an effort to get closer to her.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Chris Rock: Bigger and Blacker
programme.desc: Chris Rock asks some of life's hardest questions, like how to be a good parent, what is racism and who should always get the big piece of chicken.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.
